---
title: "Analysebericht"
output: pdf_document
params:
  analysis_title: "Analyse"
  formula_text: ""
  sample_size: ""
  result_text: ""
  plot_path: ""
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = FALSE, warning = FALSE, message = FALSE)
```

# Überblick

**Analyse:** `r params$analysis_title`

**Formel / Spezifikation:** `r params$formula_text`

**Verwendete Fälle:** `r params$sample_size`

# Ergebnis

```{r}
writeLines(params$result_text)
```
```{r plot_section, eval = nzchar(params$plot_path)}
knitr::include_graphics(params$plot_path)
```
